---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with the Kobiton Skills plugin
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run command / invoke tool '...'
2. With arguments '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or tool output if available.

## Environment

- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 20.x]
- Plugin version: [e.g., 1.1.0 from CHANGELOG]

## MCP connection

- [ ] `/mcp` shows kobiton server as connected
- [ ] `KOBITON_AUTH` env var is set (if using API key auth)
- [ ] OAuth login completed successfully (if using OAuth)

## Tool involved

Which MCP tool or skill triggered the issue? (e.g., `listDevices`, `run-automation-suite`)

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or logs.
